---
title: "Experiences and Side Effects Following COVID‑19 Vaccination in Bangladesh: a cross‑sectional community‑based e‑survey"
type: "conference"
author: "Das,M., Azad,A.K.,Barman,A.K.,Holy,N.A.,Akter,N., Hossain, M.J."
year: "2023"
publication: "36th BSM Annual Conference, Bangladesh Society of Microbiologists"
preprint: ""
doi: ""
materials: "publications/conference/DasM_BSM2023.pdf"
toc: false
categories:
  - Conference
---

## Abstract
